THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 2/26/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
